recommendations.title: A California Christmas
recommendations.overview: With his carefree lifestyle on the line, a wealthy charmer poses as a ranch hand to get a hardworking farmer to sell her family’s land before Christmas.

recommendations.title: Houseboat
recommendations.overview: An Italian socialite on the run signs on as housekeeper for a widower with three children.

recommendations.title: Saint Amour

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: Bruno's plan to win back his ex-girlfriend hits a snag when he becomes attracted to her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Sandy Wexler
recommendations.overview: When a hapless but dedicated talent manager signs his first client who actually has talent, his career finally starts to take off.

recommendations.title: Come As You Are

recommendations.title: The Dish
recommendations.overview: A group of maverick scientists on a remote Australian sheep farm are the globe's only hope for obtaining the epic images of man's first steps on the moon.

recommendations.title: Clara
recommendations.overview: An astronomer becomes obsessed with searching the cosmos for signs of life beyond Earth which leads to a shocking discovery.

recommendations.title: The Last Prosecco
recommendations.overview: The suicide of a prominent wine producer unleashes a series of mysterious murders.

recommendations.title: The Tasting
